options.code:
wwFormulas.sort(wwFormulas.add(collections['fb5bdf06-d467-442e-b04c-43bb985fd894']?.['data'] 
?.filter(item =>
  item.integration === "WhatsApp" &&
  ! wwFormulas.filterByKey(
    collections['66752e30-5abe-448c-8a9b-187a10c0baa7']?.['data'],
    "destination_stage_id",
    context.item.data?.['destination_stage_id'] 
  )
  ?.map(i => i.connection_to_assign_id)
  ?.includes(item.id)
)
?.sort((a, b) => a.order_number - b.order_number)
,wwFormulas.lookup(context.item.data?.['connection_to_assign_id'],collections['fb5bdf06-d467-442e-b04c-43bb985fd894']?.['data'])),"order_number")

09890bab-1fe5-4bc4-8867-8690394f3ca6.code:
return await wwLib.wwPlugins.supabase.instance
  .schema('conversions')
  .from(globalContext.browser?.['query']?.['empresa'])
  .select(`
    id,
    platform,
    campaign_id,
    adgroup_id,
    ad_id,
    utm_source,
    utm_medium,
    fbclid,
    user_ip,
    user_agent,
    conversion_time,
    conversion_contact_id,
    conversion_contact_phone,
    conversion_contact_formatted_phone,
    country,
    state,
    city,
    connection_id,
    connection_whatsapp,
    event,
    currency,
    amount,
    payment_method,
    device,
    keyword,
    page_url
  `)
  .gte('conversion_time', new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString())
  .order('conversion_time', { ascending: true })

f21d6d55-fabf-4698-a601-ac3edb3c65ff.code:
return await wwLib.wwPlugins.supabase.instance
    .schema('messages')
    .from(variables['30fb0f00-4053-448c-baac-2bd42f5fe71b'])
    .select()
    .eq('contact', context.item.data?.['contact'])
    .order('timestamp', { ascending: false })
    .limit(50);

variables['019fd5a9-ebd0-4f01-8a78-106cc6c53553'].automations_time_limits.map(tl => ({
  day_of_the_week: tl.day_of_the_week,
  locked: tl.locked,
  automation_id: context.workflow['a5cc097d-5684-4086-b57e-d7e195d19a58'].result?.['id'],
  start_time: tl.start_time,
  end_time: tl.end_time,
  enabled: tl.enabled
}))

variables['019fd5a9-ebd0-4f01-8a78-106cc6c53553'].automations_conditions.map(cond => ({
  premisse: cond.premisse,
  or: cond.or,

  copied_automation_condition_id: cond.id,
  field_id: cond.field_id,
  condition: cond.condition,
  text_array: cond.text_array
}))

variables['019fd5a9-ebd0-4f01-8a78-106cc6c53553'].actions.map(action => ({
  order_number: action.order_number,
  typing_time: action.typing_time,
  enabled: action.enabled,
  footer: action.footer,
  header: action.header,
  button_text: action.button_text,
  action_type: action.action_type,
  file: action.file,
  is_fowarded: action.is_fowarded,
  message: action.message,
  enabled_lock: action.enabled_lock,
  file_name: action.file_name,
  url: action.url,
  label: action.label,
  label_id: action.label_id,
  next_distribution_stage: action.next_distribution_stage,
  destination_stage: action.destination_stage,
  destination_journey: action.destination_journey,
  automation: context.workflow['a5cc097d-5684-4086-b57e-d7e195d19a58'].result?.['id'],
  webhook_custom_fields_array: action.webhook_custom_fields_array,
  button_type: action.button_type,
  attachment_type: action.attachment_type,
  copied_action_id: action.id,
  company_id: globalContext.browser?.['query']?.['empresa'],
  preview_link: action.preview_link
}))

variables['019fd5a9-ebd0-4f01-8a78-106cc6c53553'].actions.flatMap(action =>
  action.button_options.map(btn => ({
    text: btn.text,
    subtext: btn.subtext,
    order_number: btn.order_number,
    run_once: btn.run_once,
    button_action: context.workflow['37d9f872-814c-406f-97c1-a032b168e93e'].result.find(a => a.copied_action_id === btn.button_action)?.id,
    change_stage: btn.change_stage,
    fill_field: btn.fill_field,
    field_to_fill: btn.field_to_fill,
    text_to_fill: btn.text_to_fill,
    destination_stage: btn.destination_stage,
    destination_journey: btn.destination_journey,
    company_id: globalContext.browser?.['query']?.['empresa'],
    type: btn.type,
    action_id: context.workflow['37d9f872-814c-406f-97c1-a032b168e93e'].result.find(a => a.copied_action_id === btn.action_id)?.id,
    action_type: btn.action_type,
    journey_id: btn.journey_id,
    holding_id: variables['edfbba04-9437-47ff-be3d-9299ee1d2f33']?.['holding'],
    copied_button_option_id: btn.id
  }))
)
